_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: supervised comparison of differentially methylated CpGs revealed that 75% of these CpGs were hypomethylated in SWNTS-SWNs relative to NS-SWNs
details: Successfully processed DNA methylation data to identify differentially methylated CpG sites between SWNTS-SWNs and NS-SWNs, with 75% of differentially methylated CpGs being hypomethylated in SWNTS-SWNs
